title: Hiring Store Manager at McDonald's India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at McDonald's India
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
